pathAssistantSteps.info:
Confirm that contact has been made with the student.


Log any relevant notes or activities related to outreach.

Determine whether the student is eligible and prepared to enter the application pipeline.


If approved, move the lead to Qualified - Ready to Convert.

This lead has been successfully converted into a CPL Member.


No further action is required on the Lead record.

Continue all work on the CPL Member Account Page.

Assess the student's eligibility based on current college year and college standing.


Review academic and athletic information for accuracy.

If clarification is needed, contact the student and document the interaction.


Once eligibility is confirmed and the student is ready to move forward, update the status to Qualified - Ready to Convert.

Review the newly submitted student lead for completeness.


Confirm that the email, school, college year, resume is uploaded, and scholar statement are present and valid.


Assign yourself as the Intake Owner if you are taking ownership of this lead. The Intake Owner receives notifications for this lead going forward.


If key information is missing, move the lead to In Intake Review and initiate outreach.

This lead has been approved to move forward.


Before converting, confirm that the fields are accurate.

Convert the lead to create a CPL Member.


Do not convert unless all required academic fields are complete.

Use this status if the student is not eligible, out of scope, or a duplicate.


Document the reason for disqualification in notes or activities for future reference.
